decoder_heading: Privacy Policy
ident_heading: Privacy policy
heading_content_part: This privacy policy ("Policy") describes how the personally identifiable information ("Personal Information") you may provide in the "Al-Moazin" mobile application ("Mobile Application" or "Service") and any of its related products and services (collectively, "Services") is collected, protected and used. It also describes the choices available to you regarding our use of your Personal Information and how you can access and update this information. This Policy is a legally binding agreement between you ("User", "you" or "your") and this Mobile Application developer ("Operator", "we", "us" or "our"). By accessing and using the Mobile Application and Services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the terms of this Policy. This Policy does not apply to the practices of companies that we do not own or control, or to individuals that we do not employ or manage. This privacy policy was created with the help of the

decoder_heading: We secure information you provide on computer servers
ident_heading: We secure information you provide on computer servers
heading_content_part: We secure information you provide on computer servers in a controlled, secure environment, protected from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.

decoder_heading: We maintain reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards
ident_heading: We maintain reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards
heading_content_part: We maintain reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards in an effort to protect against unauthorized access, use, modification, and disclosure of Information in its control and custody. However, no data transmission over the Internet or wireless network can be guaranteed. Therefore, while we strive to protect your Personal Information, you acknowledge that (i) there are security and privacy limitations of the Internet which are beyond our control; (ii) the security, integrity, and privacy of any and all information and data exchanged between you and the Mobile Application and Services cannot be guaranteed; and (iii) any such information and data may be viewed or tampered with in transit by a third party, despite best efforts.

decoder_heading: In the event we become aware that the security of the Mobile Application and Services has been compromised
ident_heading: In the event we become aware that the security of the Mobile Application and Services has been compromised
heading_content_part: In the event we become aware that the security of the Mobile Application and Services has been compromised or users Personal Information has been disclosed to unrelated third parties as a result of external activity, including, but not limited to, security attacks or fraud, we reserve the right to take reasonably appropriate measures, including, but not limited to, investigation and reporting, as well as notification to and cooperation with law enforcement authorities. In the event of a data breach,

decoder_heading: We will make reasonable efforts to notify affected individuals

heading_content_part: we will make reasonable efforts to notify affected individuals if we believe that there is a reasonable risk of harm to the user as a result of the breach or if notice is otherwise required by law. When we do, we will post a notice in the Mobile Application.
